title: impatiens scabriuscula var. alba
intro: Impatiens scabriuscula var. alba is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the balsam family, characterized by its white blooms and hairy leaves. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Impatiens scabriuscula var. alba are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
